name: pr-test-seed
description: Standalone seed for PR US3-US6 testing. Reuses node_modules from ehub-nestjs-be.

scripts.seed: cross-env NODE_PATH=../ehub-nestjs-be/node_modules node -r ts-node/register -r tsconfig-paths/register index.ts

notes: Chạy từ thư mục này: cd Ehub-Atsone/seeders/pr-test
